# APPENDIX {-}

## Taxonomy overrides

```{r taxonomy-overrides}

envClean::taxonomy_overrides |> 
  dplyr::select(original_name, 
                taxa = paste0('use_', settings$context$grain$taxonomic)
                ) |> 
  knitr::kable(caption = "Manual overrides stored in the `envClean` package.")

```

## Act overrides

```{r act-overrides}

rio::import("H:/data/taxonomy/act_overrides.rds") |> 
  dplyr::select(original_name, 
                taxa = paste0('use_', settings$context$grain$taxonomic),
                note) |> 
  knitr::kable(caption = "Manual overrides saved by the `envStatus` project to deal with unmatched names that appear in threatened species legislation.")

```
